top_signals.title: A Gold Miner Is Set to Reboot a Hong Kong Listing Type Not Seen in 12 Years
top_signals.summary: Indonesian gold miner PT Merdeka Gold Resources is gearing up for a Hong Kong stock-market debut with a listing structure that’s fallen out of favor for more than a decade, a sign of the city’s booming market for fundraising drumming up interest across Asia and beyond.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
